message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame median/std/var (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame statistical
reductions:

- median_basic: 5-row 2-col, x is sorted (median=3.0), y is shuffled
  (median=30.0)
- std_basic: arithmetic-progression 'a' column has clear std,
  constant 'b' column has std=0
- var_basic: same shape, variance instead of std

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.median()/.std()/.var() and emits expected_series), runs the
Rust DataFrame.median_agg()/.std_agg()/.var_agg(), and asserts parity
via compare_series_expected. DataFrameMedian / Std / Var were already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-751dg]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
